summary: Frontend testing completed for design changes on Travito travel website. All 12 requested features verified successfully: 1) Travito logo is blue (text-blue-600), 2) Main H1 'Compare the best Visa options' is blue (text-blue-600), 3) Subheading has italic font-semibold styling, 4) Search bars have blue borders (border-2 border-blue-400), 5) No heartbeat/pulsing animation on search box, 6) Search button is blue with white text (bg-blue-600 text-white), 7) VISA INTELLIGENCE heading is blue, 8) TRENDING heading is blue (renamed from TOP DESTINATIONS), 9) Trending cards have tourist attraction photo backgrounds with linear-gradient overlay, 10) SEASONAL TRAVEL GUIDE heading is blue, 11) TRAVEL INFORMATION heading is blue, 12) Explore button after Japan search is blue with white text.

issues: Subheading paragraph under H1 uses text-gray-600 (gray) instead of black. User requested 'H2 in black bold italics' - the H3 subheadings (Trending Destinations, Explore by Category) correctly use text-gray-900 (near black) with italic styling. The main paragraph subheading may need to be changed to text-gray-900 if user wants it black.

passed_tests: Plane icon in logo is blue (text-blue-600)
Main H1 'Compare the best Visa options' has text-blue-600 class
Subheading paragraph has italic and font-semibold classes
4 search inputs found with border-blue-400 class (blue borders)
No heartbeat/animate-ping animation in search area
Search button has bg-blue-600 and text-white classes
VISA INTELLIGENCE heading has text-blue-600 class
TRENDING heading found with text-blue-600 class
TOP DESTINATIONS heading correctly renamed to TRENDING
10 trending cards found with background images (tourist attraction photos)
SEASONAL TRAVEL GUIDE heading has text-blue-600 class
TRAVEL INFORMATION heading has text-blue-600 class
Search for Japan shows visa options
Explore button has bg-blue-600 and text-white classes
Visa option card has border-2 border-blue-400 (blue border)
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation.js correctly implements blue Travito logo with text-blue-600 on both plane icon and text
Seasons.js H1 correctly uses text-blue-600 for main heading
All section headings (VISA INTELLIGENCE, TRENDING, SEASONAL TRAVEL GUIDE, TRAVEL INFORMATION) correctly use text-blue-600
Search inputs correctly use border-2 border-blue-400 for blue borders
Heartbeat animation (animate-ping, destination-heartbeat) removed from search area
Search button and Explore button correctly use bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white
Trending cards use backgroundImage with linear-gradient overlay and tourist attraction photos from COUNTRY_IMAGES mapping
H3 subheadings (Trending Destinations, Explore by Category) use italic text-gray-900 for black italic styling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design changes verified: 1) Blue color scheme applied to logo, H1, section headings, search button, explore button using text-blue-600 and bg-blue-600 classes, 2) Search bars have blue borders (border-2 border-blue-400), 3) Heartbeat animation removed, 4) TOP DESTINATIONS renamed to TRENDING, 5) Trending cards have tourist attraction photo backgrounds with gradient overlay. Minor note: Main subheading paragraph uses text-gray-600 (gray) while H3 subheadings use text-gray-900 (near black) with italic styling.

search_bars_blue_border.element: Destination, Visa Type, Month, Year inputs

trending_cards_backgrounds.style: backgroundImage with linear-gradient overlay and tourist attraction photos
